notes:
There's only one other report on this game as I am writing this, and the problem they had is that they did not have Arma 2: Operation Arrowhead installed. Considering this mod is a mod of that game, you need the base game for this to work. 

However, I installed Arma 2: Operation Arrowhead, and resulted in a problem with BattleEye. BattleEye needs to be installed for this game to run, and after clicking install the game crashes.
title: Arma II: DayZ Mod

notes: This mod will not work as the base game does not work because of BattlEye
title: Arma II: DayZ Mod
